<!-- v111: autogenerated index for v71..v100 kernel doc pages -->
# Creation OS · Kernel Index v71 – v100

Per-kernel doc pages for the v71 – v100 tranche, generated by
[`tools/docs/generate_kernel_pages.py`](../tools/docs/generate_kernel_pages.py)
from the source-header comments of `src/v{N}/creation_os_v{N}.c`.

Each page follows the same layout: **title · abstract · source files ·
self-test command · layer membership · source-header excerpt**.  The
architectural context is described in
[`docs/AGI_ARCHITECTURE.md`](AGI_ARCHITECTURE.md).

## Layer 2 — Generation support (v71 – v79)

| Kernel | Title | Page |
|--------|-------|------|
| v71 | σ-Wormhole | [docs/v71/README.md](v71/README.md) |
| v72 | σ-Neuron | [docs/v72/README.md](v72/README.md) |

*(v75 was retired — see `docs/DOC_INDEX.md` for the retirement note.)*

## Running the self-tests

From a clean checkout:

```bash
# individual kernel
make check-v80

# every v71..v100 kernel in the tree (part of the merge gate)
make check-v60-v100
```

`check-v60-v100` is wired into `make merge-gate` — see
[`docs/v111/THE_FRONTIER_MATRIX.md`](v111/THE_FRONTIER_MATRIX.md) for
the upstream `v111.*` gates that also run as part of `merge-gate`.
